author: nomarcub
description: Automatically hides the sidebars when your window is narrow on window resize.

manifest.author: NomarCub, Michael Hanson
manifest.description: Automatically hides the sidebars when your window is resized to be narrower.
manifest.name: Hide Sidebars on Window Resize

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
Don't auto-expand sidebars when in "compact mode", specifically in the [Zen Mode plugin](https://github.com/paperbenni/obsidian-zenmode)'s zen mode, see #8 

## New Contributors
* @HerrChaos made their first contribution in https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-hide-sidebars-on-window-resize/pull/8

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/NomarCub/obsidian-hide-sidebars-on-window-resize/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1
